# LLMS Rules for Teklif Hazırlama
Title: Teklif Hazırlama Aracı Documentation
Description: AI-driven proposal and CRM tool for landscaping and construction.

## Crawling Rules
- Access all service descriptions in /public/
- Do not crawl personal user data in /api/
- Respect the primary domain: https://www.teklifhazirlama.com/
